codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature scope: student register/login endpoints exist, OTP endpoints are absent (404), and /login is rewritten to email+password with register mode. One non-blocking robustness issue was identified in duplicate detection for Supabase Auth users.

issues.description: Duplicate-user precheck uses supabaseAdmin.auth.admin.listUsers() without pagination/error handling, so existing auth users beyond the first page can be missed; createUser then fails and is returned as a generic 500 instead of a conflict-style response.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill procedure is stricter than actual worker behavior: it requires npm run lint and push to main, but this session's handoff/transcript evidence shows only type-check/build plus commit. The skill likely needs alignment with mission orchestration expectations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md:37-41,52-55 require lint and push; handoffs/2026-04-17T13-51-24-113Z__auth-student-simplify__47db44f0-db07-4417-8a24-110fb4396643.json:14-24 shows only type-check/build in verification commands, with no lint or push recorded.

summary: Reviewed commit c9c4746 and the worker transcript skeleton for auth-student-simplify. Feature requirements are met and behavior aligns with expected student password auth flow; review passes with one non-blocking API robustness issue and one skill/procedure shared-state observation.
